title: Fusion connected copper grate
description: texture pack to add connected texture to copper grate
body:
<center> 
  
## Fusion Connected copper grate adds connecting textures for all stage of copper grate waxed or unwaxed 

ps: base version does not connect with waxed version and different oxidation level doesn't connect together either. 
  
![copper banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0174acebb087b2631d7be10d692d1fc0c2e0fdd7.png) 

## Fusion Connected copper grate requires Fusion to work correctly. You can find Fusion by clicking [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/fusion-connected-textures).

![https://modrinth.com/mod/fusion-connected-textures](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CelestialAbyss/badges/refs/heads/main/fusion/requires/compact_vector.svg)
</center>

### link
[CurseForge page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fusion-connected-copper-grate)
